overall_justification: While the newspaper mentions the "Caixa de Conversão," it does so in a purely factual manner, reporting on the quantity of notes processed. There is no editorializing, argumentation, or endorsement of any particular stance regarding the conversion itself.

supporting_evidence.quote: Nas duas casas "Caixa de Conversão" foram hontem recolhidas 104.824,- no valor de 32.781$000 e frs. 8,0, no valor de 1$750, perfazendo o total de 32.781$750, em notas conversíveis.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote is a factual report of the Caixa's activity, devoid of any editorial slant.

supporting_evidence.quote: A Casa da Moeda passou a remetter directamente a Caixa de Conversão as notas conversíveis, cuja impressão está sendo feita.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This is another purely factual statement about the production and delivery of convertible notes.
